subcodes.first_line: O thou who art yearning for the Countenance of the All-Glorious! In the realm of material existence, passion holdeth sway as sovereign, and in that ailing dominion reigneth as king [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق جمال ذوالجلال در کشور هستی عنصری سلطان هوی شهریار و در اقلیم سقیم
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
